extension.description: Render Markdown in place inside the editor — in code comments and .md files, without opening a preview pane
config.languages.description: Restrict to specific language IDs (empty = all languages)
config.hideMarkers.description: Visually hide Markdown markers such as **, *, `, # (except on the cursor line)
config.renderFencedCode.description: Decorate fenced code blocks (```) inside comments
config.renderFencedCodeBackground.descri: Render background color for fenced code blocks
config.fencedCodeFullWidth.description: Fill the fenced code block background to the end of the line (full editor width). Turn this on when gaps between lines are noticeable, to hide the seams
config.highlightFencedCode.description: Syntax-highlight code inside fenced code blocks according to its language (e.g. ```python)
config.renderLists.description: Decorate bullet lists and task lists inside comments
config.renderTables.description: Decorate Markdown tables inside comments (assumes a monospace font)
config.renderBlockquotes.description: Decorate blockquotes (> ) with a vertical bar on the left edge
config.renderMarkdownFile.description: In Markdown (.md) files, decorate the entire file in place, not just comments
command.toggle.title: Toggle Markdown InPlace
command.toggleHideMarkers.title: Toggle Marker Hiding (Markdown InPlace)
command.toggleMarkdownFile.title: Toggle Markdown File Rendering (Markdown InPlace)
config.renderInlineImages.description: Show an image icon next to image alt text (![alt](url)) in the editor (requires Hide Markers to be on)
config.renderImageHover.description: Decorate image links (![caption](url)) with image previews on hover
config.renderLinkHover.description: Show a preview of the target section on hover for links with anchors ([text](file#heading))
config.hoverImageMaxWidth.description: The maximum width of the image preview on hover (in pixels)
